summary: The user is planning a baby shower gift for a friend, having already purchased a personalized baby blanket from Etsy for $40. They are considering adding a baby skincare set and discussing the importance of including a gift receipt and a personal message in a card to enhance the gift's thoughtfulness.
facts: The user purchased a personalized baby blanket from Etsy for $40, choosing a soft, pastel pink color and having it monogrammed with the baby's initials. The user is considering adding a baby skincare set to the gift for the baby shower. The user plans to check local stores for the skincare set due to time constraints before the baby shower. The user intends to ask for a gift receipt when purchasing the skincare set to allow the parents to exchange it if needed. The user plans to include a card with a personal message, stating, "Congratulations on the new addition to your family! Wishing you all the best as you start this new chapter. Love, [Your Name]."
